description: This file implements an in-memory repository for managing documents and extracted text data, including functions for creating, listing, retrieving, and updating documents and their associated extracted text. It serves as a temporary persistence layer until a database (PostgreSQL) is available.

methods.name: createDocument
methods.description: Creates a new document record in memory with provided input data and returns the document object.

methods.name: listDocuments
methods.description: Returns a list of documents stored in memory, ordered by creation date descending, with optional pagination.

methods.name: getDocumentById
methods.description: Fetches a document by its ID, returning null if not found.

methods.name: upsertExtractedText
methods.description: Appends extracted text data for a specific document in memory, maintaining insert-only semantics.

methods.name: getLatestExtractedText
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent extracted text blob for a given document.

methods.name: getLatestDocumentForUserByCategory
methods.description: Fetches the latest document for a user and category, ordered by creation date.
